steps.title: Set up the quadratic equation
steps.content: The product of $x$ and $(x-11)$ equals $350$: $$x(x-11)=350 \implies x^2-11x-350=0.$$

steps.title: Solve and identify x
steps.content: Factor: $(x-25)(x+14)=0$, giving $x=25$ or $x=-14$. Since $x$ is positive, $x=25$. The answer is 25.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $25$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $25$ is the value to enter.
